title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Mahindra Finance - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Mahindra Finance - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Mahindra Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Pimpri-Chinchwad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Mahindra Finance:
Mahindra Finance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Finance!
